title: veronica austriaca var. tenuis
intro: Veronica austriaca var. tenuis, also known as Austrian speedwell, is a plant species within the Veronicaceae family and is native to Europe. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of this plant have been used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Austrian speedwell are said to include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and easing respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Austrian speedwell can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
